sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104766" key="triakonta/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐᾱκοντά-σημος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[τᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104766.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of thirty times,</tr_> in metre, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:13:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
